data.name: Return of the Boogeyman 👻
data.detailed_description:
Becky wants to sell her childhood home. Should be easy to do, right? One last bath in the beautiful tub is all she wants, but just as she begins to relax, the bathroom door opens. And in creeps a friend from long ago. Only, this friend isn’t there to play games. He’s got Becky’s hot body on his mind!

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sexual adventures of girls with demonic creatures

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Monster

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphic

• Girl's and Monster's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

data.short_description: Becky was supposed to sell her childhood home, but taking one more bath won’t hurt the sale, right? Just as she’s enjoying herself, an old friend comes to play. And he’s not interested in her reasons for selling! He’s got eyes only for Becky’s beautiful body!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
